description: This file defines a utility class 'ScrollBarHelper' for managing scrollbar behavior and styling adjustments in Bootstrap, including methods to hide/show scrollbars and calculate scrollbar width.

classes.name: ScrollBarHelper
classes.description: A utility class for managing scrollbar visibility and related style adjustments in Bootstrap.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Calculates and returns the width of the scrollbar.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the scrollbar by adjusting padding and margin styles.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets style adjustments made to hide the scrollbar.

methods.name: isOverflowing
methods.description: Checks if the content is overflowing, indicating scrollbar presence.

methods.name: _disableOverFlow
methods.description: Disables overflow on the body element.

methods.name: _setElementAttributes
methods.description: Sets style properties on elements matching a selector.

methods.name: _saveInitialAttribute
methods.description: Saves the current style property value before modification.

methods.name: _resetElementAttributes
methods.description: Resets style properties to their original values.

methods.name: _applyManipulationCallback
methods.description: Applies a callback function to elements matching a selector.
